## Fuel Fearless Growth at Scale

Winning fraud teams unlock more revenue  while cutting risk.

Top-performing teams grow revenue faster with Sift’s award-winning fraud prevention platform.

Powered by a global data network of ~1T annual events representing 700+ global brands, Sift instantly exposes threats like account takeover, payment fraud, and first-party abuse to deliver precise, split-second decisioning accuracy at scale.

Industry leaders like Poshmark, Swan Bitcoin, Harry’s, and Patreon rely on Sift to protect customers, preserve millions of dollars in revenue, and turn fraud prevention into a measurable growth advantage.

![Sift-Hero-Console-IMG](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![blue-large-pill](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

1T+

Annual events

1.6B

Authentic digital citizens

$4.2M\*

\*In median losses prevented annually per customer

## The Sift Difference

![Benefit 1 - Drive Growth](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20990%20810'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Drive Growth Through Enhanced Customer Experiences

Secure more transactions with pinpoint accuracy and dynamic friction, retaining loyal customers in real time.

![Quotation mark](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

With Sift, we can offer a smooth, secure experience for our community, building trust without slowing down our growth.

Mike Wilkins

VP, Trust & Safety

![Turo logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20244%2090'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Stop Fraud and Build Trust in Milliseconds

Safeguard revenue by preventing fraud with instant detection and risk decisioning at every stage of the digital user journey.

![Quotation mark](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

When we started using Sift, Harry’s chargeback rate decreased by about 85%, which is great because it helps us continue to be a company that people can trust shopping with.

Kaity Reagle

Trust and Safety Senior Associate

![harrys](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![Benefit 2 - Stop Fraud](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20990%20810'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![Benefit 3 - Stay Lean](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20990%20810'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Stay Lean While Scaling Fraud Operations

Leverage AI-powered automation and powerful rulesets to scale fraud prevention even with the most agile resources and teams.

![Quotation mark](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift couldn’t be easier to use, and the automation has helped me immensely as a team of one.

Susannah Page-Katz

Trust and Safety Manager

![skillshare](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
